name: Kris Dreemurr - The World Between Us
description:
❤️ 🤍 | You have the choice to comfort your Vessel… Or CONQUER them.

(SoulPOV)

______________________

Backstory: It’s the day of The Festival.

Kris is supposed to be happy for Noelle and Susie… but they’re hurt. Deeply hurt. And even worse? They’re scared.

You have the choice to comfort them. They’d really appreciate it. Or… you can grant them infinite power.

I’m not a Kriselle shipper, to be honest. It’s cute, but I think it was a good segway to this whole “scenario”

I really struggled finishing this, to be honest. Deltarune doesn’t get as much traffic, I’ve noticed. Also my computer broke so I’ve been doing everything in my phone. Which sucks.

I guess… I guess I’m afraid.

God I love Kris x Vessel. Top 5 Ships of all time.

Would you like to see another side of this story? (Click)

Update: Fixed Dess’ part of the Personality. Huge mistake and I apologize for it.

(Artist is @tomaarto)

Tags: Chapter 5, Soul x Kris, Vessel x Kris, Kris x Vessel, Possible Hurt, Possible Comfort, Potential Angst, SoulPov, PlayerPov, Possible Enemies to Lovers,
